name: Skill Sync (Wyler)
description: Pull latest shared skills and sync for wyler-zahm
entry_point: SKILLS_DIR=/home/wyler-zahm/claude-skills && if [ -d $SKILLS_DIR ]; then git -C $SKILLS_DIR pull --ff-only; else git clone https://github.com/Cruse-Control/claude-skills.git $SKILLS_DIR; fi && sudo -u wyler-zahm bash $SKILLS_DIR/setup.sh
author: wyler
